dashboard.overviewDesc: Server and database statuses in this environment will be listed here.
dashboard.connectionFailedDesc: Please check your database settings and network access.
dashboard.addDbDesc: Enter the connection details for a new database in this environment.
dashboard.fillAllFields: Please fill in all connection details.
dashboard.editDbDesc: Update the selected database details or remove the connection from the system.
dashboard.removeDbWarning: This database connection will be removed from the environment. (The actual database will not be affected).

queries.title: Query Console
queries.saveQueryDesc: Name your code to reuse it later.
queries.deleteQueryDesc1: You are about to delete the query named. This action cannot be undone. Are you sure?
queries.customQueryAuthDesc: Admin approval is required to run a custom or modified query.
queries.saveAuthDesc: Admin approval is required to permanently add a new query to the system.
queries.updateAuthDesc: Admin approval is required to modify the code of an existing saved query.
queries.deleteAuthDesc: Admin approval is required to permanently delete a saved query from the system.

tables.title: Tables
tables.selectToStart: Select a table from the left menu to start.

views.title: Views
views.selectToStart: Select a View from the left menu to inspect.

procedures.title: Stored Procedures
procedures.dangerousOpWarning: This stored procedure contains a dangerous command that modifies or deletes data. Are you sure you want to continue?
procedures.dangerousOpBadge: This SP contains a data modification/deletion operation.
procedures.noParams: This stored procedure does not take any external parameters.
procedures.noDataReturned: Query executed successfully but returned no table data.
procedures.selectToStart: Select a Stored Procedure from the left menu to inspect or execute.

jobs.title: SQL Job Management
jobs.description: Monitor and manage background jobs with SSMS quality.
jobs.confirmStart: Are you sure you want to start this job?
jobs.confirmStop: Are you sure you want to stop this job?
jobs.commandRequired: T-SQL command is required for all steps.
jobs.noSchedules: No schedules assigned to this job.

activity.title: Activity Monitor
activity.dataFetchError: System monitor data could not be fetched:

maintenance.title: Database Maintenance
maintenance.authIndexDescCritical: The index in table [{{table}}] will be rebuilt. Admin approval is required.
maintenance.authIndexDescHealthy: The index in table [{{table}}] will be reorganized. Admin approval is required.
maintenance.authLogDesc: Shrinking the database transaction log (LDF) file may affect disk performance. Admin approval is required.
maintenance.authStatDesc: Database maps for table [{{table}}] will be refreshed. Admin approval is required.
maintenance.authAllStatsDesc: Statistics of all tables in the database will be refreshed. This operation may burden the server. Admin approval is required.
maintenance.fragmentedIndexesDesc: Indexes degraded above 10% seriously drop query performance.
maintenance.noFragmentedIndexes: There are no fragmented indexes in your database. The system is running at full performance.
maintenance.fileSizesDesc: Analyze the space your database takes on the disk and shrink logs if necessary.
maintenance.staleStatsDesc: If the system is slow but your indexes are healthy, SQL's data map is stale. You can refresh them all with one click.
maintenance.statsGreatDesc: All your statistics are up to date. The system is working with fresh data.

livePanel.title: Live Data Monitoring
livePanel.description: Table data is updated automatically in the background at set intervals. It will be stopped after 10 minutes for security reasons.

dataTable.editInstruction: You can change the boxes to update the data.
dataTable.infoInstruction: You can see all column data for this record below.
dataTable.numberError: This field can only contain numeric values.
dataTable.updateDataDesc:
You are about to update the data in this row in the database. This action cannot be undone.

Are you sure?
dataTable.updateAuthDesc: You must enter the system administrator password to modify table records.

passwordModal.defaultDesc: You must enter the administrator password to perform this action.
passwordModal.verifyError: An error occurred while verifying the password.

settings.title: System Settings
settings.description: Central configuration, appearance, and security management.
settings.authError: An error occurred while verifying the password.
settings.uiDescription: Customize the system according to your personal preferences.
settings.appThemeDesc: Select the color palette that suits you best. Changes apply instantly.
settings.languageDesc: Select the language you want to use in the application.
settings.defaultPageSizeDesc: Number of records fetched and displayed per page in database tables. (Recommended: 50 or 100)
settings.lockedAreaDesc: Unlock the admin lock to change system settings.
settings.securityAuthDesc: Set the password required for critical operations and specify which operations need admin approval.
settings.maintenanceDesc: Determine under which conditions the system will show a 'Red/Yellow' warning bar.

permissions.logShrinkDesc: Locks this operation that affects disk space.
permissions.statsUpdateDesc: Requires approval when refreshing data maps.
permissions.customQueryExecutionDesc: Locks running queries written from scratch or modified.
permissions.queryManagementDesc: Locks query saving, overwriting, and deleting operations.

tenants.title: Workspaces
tenants.description: Select the client or project you want to manage. You can add resources (DB, Server) from within.
tenants.noTenantYet: You haven't created any workspaces yet.
tenants.clickToCreate: Click 'Create Workspace' on the top right.
tenants.createModalDesc: Create an empty workspace for your client or project.
tenants.descriptionPlaceholder: The purpose of this workspace or brief notes...
tenants.settingsModalDesc: Update workspace details or permanently delete it.
tenants.deleteWarning: All database and server records belonging to this workspace will be permanently deleted.
tenants.deleteError: An error occurred while deleting the workspace.
